name: kungfuwiki
description: Some documentation on Kung Fu forms

scripts.build: tsc && cd dist && node src/main.js && cp -r ../static ./out/
scripts.build-dev: tsc && cd dist && node src/main.js && ln -sf ../static/images ./out/images && ln -sf ../static/videos ./out/videos
scripts.run-dev-server: nodemon --exec "npm run build-dev && cd dist/out && python3 -m http.server"

author: Amir Czwink
